zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam De Melun IV於大約1240年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯默倫時，他的父親Count Adam III de Melun31歲，母親Constance de Sancerre Comtessa de Sancerre et Nesle20歲。他於1280年與Jeanne de Sully結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1306年5月12日在他的家鄉享年67歲，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-吉馬內。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam De Melun IV于大约1240年出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯默倫时，他的父亲Count Adam III de Melun31岁，母亲Constance de Sancerre Comtessa de Sancerre et Nesle20岁。他于1280年与Jeanne de Sully结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1306年5月12日在他的家乡享年67岁，埋葬在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-吉馬內。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Melun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Alvar, Anders, Hilmer, Hiltrud, Sven.

Swedish: probably an ornamental or habitational name formed with the (placename) element mel, from Old Norse methal ‘mid, middle’, + the adjectival suffix -in, a derivative of Latin -in(i)us ‘relating to’.
Czech (Melín): from a pet form of the personal name Melichar ‘Melchior’.

variants.name: Lemelin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Monique, Alcide, Armand, Damien, Emile, Gaston, Marcel, Rosaire.
French: from the personal name Melin (see Melin 4) or its cognate Emelin, with fused definite article l(e).
History: Jean Lemelin dit (Le) Tourangeau from Chartres in Eure-et-Loir, France, married Marguerite Brassard in Quebec City, QC, in 1658.

variants.name: Melichar
meanings: Czech; Slovak (also Melichár): from a vernacular form of the Biblical personal name Melchior .

variants.name: Meline
meanings: French: from a shortened form of the personal name Ameline, feminine form of Amelin (see Melin 4).

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam De Melun IV was born about 1240, in Melun, Île-de-France, France, his father, Count Adam III de Melun, was 31 and his mother, Constance de Sancerre Comtessa de Sancerre et Nesle, was 20. He married Jeanne de Sully in 1280. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 12 May 1306, in his hometown, at the age of 67, and was buried in Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam De Melun IV est né environ 1240, à Melun, Île-de-France, France, son père, Count Adam III de Melun, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Constance de Sancerre Comtessa de Sancerre et Nesle, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de Sully en 1280. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 12 mai 1306, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam De Melun IV um 1240 in Melun, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Count Adam III de Melun 31 und seine Mutter Constance de Sancerre Comtessa de Sancerre et Nesle 20. Er hat 1280 Jeanne de Sully geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 12. Mai 1306 im Alter von 67 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam De Melun IV è nato il circa 1240 nel Melun, Île-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Count Adam III de Melun, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Constance de Sancerre Comtessa de Sancerre et Nesle, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne de Sully nel 1280. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 12 maggio 1306, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam De Melun IVが約1240年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスメルンで生まれた時，父Count Adam III de Melunは31歳，母Constance de Sancerre Comtessa de Sancerre et Nesleは20歳であった。1280年にJeanne de Sullyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1306年5月12日に故郷で67歳で死去し，フランスiレ-デ-フランスセアイネ-エト-マルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam De Melun IV(이)가 대략 1240년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 멜루에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Count Adam III de Melun(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Constance de Sancerre Comtessa de Sancerre et Nesle(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1280년 Jeanne de Sully(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1306년 5월 12일 그의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 세이인-트-마니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam De Melun IV nasceu aproximadamente 1240, em Melun, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Count Adam III de Melun, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Constance de Sancerre Comtessa de Sancerre et Nesle, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de Sully em 1280. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de maio de 1306, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam De Melun IV родился около 1240 г. в местности мелун, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Count Adam III de Melun было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Constance de Sancerre Comtessa de Sancerre et Nesle, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de Sully в 1280 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 12 мая 1306 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности сине-ет-марн, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

sm.from 1278 to 1304: mai le 1278 e o'o I le 1304

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adam De Melun IV nació aproximadamente 1240, en Melun, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Count Adam III de Melun, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Constance de Sancerre Comtessa de Sancerre et Nesle, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Jeanne de Sully en 1280. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 12 de mayo de 1306, en su pueblo, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, Francia.
